playbooks.minimum_evidence_threshold: One reviewed bounded-change run with explicit verification artifacts.
playbooks.next_trigger: Review again only if a materially different bounded-change execution pattern lands.

composition_signal_summary.failure_or_follow_up: The current bounded-change pattern already covers the stable failure and follow-up posture needed for fixture-level execution seams.
composition_signal_summary.adjunct_candidate: A compact automation and handoff contour is already legible enough for fixture-level composition review.
